data.title: Hick's Law Implementation
data.description: Simplify decisions for users by reducing the number of choices.
data.technical_spec: Streamline UI elements to ease cognitive load and speed up decision-making.

data.title: Fitts’s Law Optimization
data.description: Design interfaces that facilitate easy target selection.
data.technical_spec: Strategically place interactive elements for effortless user actions.

data.title: Consistency Principle
data.description: Maintain a consistent design language across different platforms for better user experience.
data.technical_spec: Develop and adhere to a comprehensive style guide and component library.

data.title: Feedback Mechanism
data.description: Provide immediate and clear feedback to user actions.
data.technical_spec: Implement notifications, confirmations, and error messages as appropriate.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Enhance usability by making attractive and pleasant designs.
data.technical_spec: Employ appealing visuals while ensuring functionality and accessibility.
